name: Virtus Convertible & Income Fund II 5.50% Series A Cumulative Preferred Shares
summary: Virtus Convertible & Income Fund II 5.50% Series A Cumulative Preferred Shares is a closed-end management investment company seeking to provide total return through a combination of current income and capital appreciation. The fund invests primarily in a diversified portfolio of convertible securities and income-producing common stocks. The fund is managed by Virtus Investment Advisers, Inc.
